news.t: AI Ranks Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 Pure Value ETF Best Smart Beta ETF
Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.

holdings.infoBox: RZV is an equity ETF with a total of 160 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ichor Holdings stock at 2.42%, Vishay Intertechnology at 1.85%, ArcBest at 1.82%, Acadia Healthcare Company at 1.59%, and Vestis at 1.53%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Smallcap 600 Pure Value ETF (RZV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Pure Value index. The fund tracks a fundamentally-weighted index of US small-cap, pure value companies. RZV was launched on Mar 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.text: After growth's long ascendancy, value shares are getting their day in the sun. To determine which have the best prospects, check for factors including liquidity, quality, size, and momentum.
